DTR  |  Listen to a Short Exchange
LSE-MS7-L4-1400P-MSVPA-BNB-LAT-02 • MS Visual and Performing Arts — Music 6–8th • Personal Interests, Knowledge, and Ideas in Artistic Choices

The Last Show Tonight

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
Why is the boy playing the bolero at the end of the news clip?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Construct a complete academic justification. State your claim about why the boy chooses the bolero his abuelo used to sing, support that claim with reasoning drawn directly from what he says about his abuelo and what tonight is, and articulate the conclusion that follows about what the song carries for him.
CA ELD PI.B.5 | NCAS Music Cn10 | Grade 7: MS Visual and Performing Arts — Music 6–8th
